Speaker: SPEAKER 2
Text: There's this.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I have a little news that I'd like to give you as well, and it has to do with this program.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: I have been absolutely delighted for the last five years to be working with some of the

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: most talented people in television news, just really stellar, stellar producers, writers,

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: researchers, reporters, just remarkable people here at CNN.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And so it is really tough to tell you that I'm going to be leaving.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Kind of.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: But I'm going to leave this time slot at 12 noon, and I'm going to make the jump and follow

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: my friends over at HLN.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: We've already heard that Michaela Perera has jumped over there, or Hills over there, Robin

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: need.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So I'm going to jump over to Primetime on HLN 8 p.m. in the fall, super excited to do it.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: We're going to bring a really unique brand of social and legal issues oriented programming

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: to that 8 p.m. spot.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Lots more news and details about it will follow, but I just wanted to let you know what a privilege

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: it's been at 12 noon to be with you every day.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And if you will just indulge me for a moment, you see me all the time, but you don't see Christina

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: or Sonya or Lindsay or Robin or Chris or Scotty or Gus and Alex and Ariel and Lamy and

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: Tondu and Dave, this is my family.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And every single day it is a delight to get up at 4.30 in the morning and be with them.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: And I say that honestly.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: So thank you for being here at 12 noon every day.

Text: Still going to be here for a few more weeks from the 23rd, it will be our last program here.

Text: But I'll be seeing you over on HLN at 8 p.m., very exciting time for us all here at CNN and

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
Text: HLN.

Text: And I will still be doing a lot of stuff on CNN as well.

Speaker: SPEAKER 1
